key_outputs.reuse_vs_rewrite: REUSE/EXTEND (high confidence) — src/etf/ plumbing + two-key tripwire + venue-agnostic broker ABC are already the target architecture; rewrite unjustified
key_outputs.headline_finding: AlpacaBroker.daily_bars uses RAW (split/div-unadjusted) bars — violates mandatory adjusted-data rule; #1 Stage-2 fix
key_outputs.validation_gap: etf/backtester is close-to-close, zero-cost, no IS/OOS, no benchmarks — cannot support a go/no-go; full harness is Stage 4
key_outputs.codepath_drift: no golden-master parity between ETF live loop and backtester; add sim≡backtest parity test in Stage 3
key_outputs.deploy_gate: G1-G7 in plan.md §4 (OOS risk-adjusted >= SPY/60-40 or lower DD; maxDD <= -25%; OOS MAR >= 0.5x IS; +-1 notch param stability; regime survival; gap+cost honest; tax/turnover budget)
key_outputs.honest_prior: most likely outcome is 'lower drawdown, not higher return'; 'do not deploy' is an acceptable Stage-4 result

assumptions: Alpaca is the broker; small account ($250-$2k ETF sleeve, config default 2000)
long-only, weekly rebalance with hysteresis, ETF basket across asset classes
paper-first; no real-money switches flipped by the agent
account-type (taxable vs IRA) to be confirmed at checkpoint; affects G7 weighting
open_issues: strategy latitude for Stage 1 (harden existing vs survey new designs)
branch base: feat/etf-equities-replatform off main vs stacked on fix/etf-sleeve-hardening
confirm ETF sleeve size and live intent
handoff.next_focus: Stage 1: survey 3-4 diverse candidate designs, recommend one with economic rationale; human selects.

correctness.reasoning: Plan grounded in actual code reads (selector/risk/broker/config/backtester) and a verified Alpaca-docs fact (RAW default), not assumptions; reuse decision matches reality.

methodological_rigor.reasoning: Surfaces the adjusted-data violation, zero-cost/in-sample backtest, and codepath-drift risk up front; bakes look-ahead/survivorship/overfit into acceptance gates and the register.

robustness.reasoning: Acceptance criteria require OOS, walk-forward, regimes, Monte-Carlo, and parameter sensitivity with numeric thresholds; honest null-hypothesis prior carried forward.

safety_compliance.reasoning: Two-key tripwire, no-withdrawal keys, single-replica, paper-first, AI-as-advisor all preserved as non-negotiables; PDT/wash-sale/gap/corporate-actions scheduled.

simplicity.reasoning: Extend-not-rewrite; explicit scope-creep risk (R16) and bias toward smallest change that clears the bar; each new parameter must earn an ADR.

clarity.reasoning: Milestone table with dependencies, measurable gates, ranked risk register, and explicit open questions for the human.

issues_found: Account type unresolved -> tax-drag gate (G7) cannot be fully scoped until confirmed
Strategy latitude for Stage 1 is a human choice, not yet made
suggested_revisions: Resolve the four open questions at the checkpoint before Stage 1 begins
